test_scenarios.given: An ECS task definition with host network mode and all containers have privileged=true and non-root user
An ECS task definition with awsvpc network mode (not host)
test_scenarios.then: The policy should pass (not evaluated due to filter)

test_scenarios.given: An ECS task definition with host network mode but a container has privileged=false
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with privileged error message

test_scenarios.given: An ECS task definition with host network mode but a container has missing privileged attribute
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with privileged error message

test_scenarios.given: An ECS task definition with host network mode but a container has user='root'
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with user error message

test_scenarios.given: An ECS task definition with host network mode but a container has missing user attribute
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with user error message

test_scenarios.given: An ECS task definition with host network mode with multiple containers, one violates privileged requirement
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with privileged error message

test_scenarios.given: An ECS task definition with host network mode with multiple containers, one violates user requirement
test_scenarios.then: The policy should fail with user error message
